summary: Frontend testing completed for Replyzen AI branding update, sidebar fixes, and billing checkout flows. All requested features verified working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Console warning: Paddle.Initialize() not called - may cause unexpected behavior in production
integration_issues.note: Expected - requires valid Paddle credentials and initialization for production use

passed_tests: Emergent badge removed from all pages (verified via script and visual)
No 'Made with Emergent' text or links to emergent.sh found anywhere
Sidebar is fixed at viewport height (h-screen/1080px) with position: fixed
Sidebar toggle collapse/expand works (260px expanded, 68px collapsed)
Sidebar stays fixed at top (top: 0) when page scrolls
Login flow works with test@test.com / test credentials
Billing page displays all 3 plans (Free, Pro, Business) correctly
Plan features and prices displayed correctly ($0/forever, $19/month, $49/month)
Usage stats shown: 0/30 follow-ups used this month
Razorpay checkout button click shows error toast 'Invalid Razorpay plan configuration' (expected)
Paddle checkout button attempts to open Paddle modal (expected behavior with placeholder IDs)
Mobile responsive view works - hamburger menu present, sidebar hidden
Mobile sidebar drawer opens correctly with all navigation items
Footer shows '© 2026 Replyzen AI. All rights reserved.' with no Emergent branding
action_items: For production: Call Paddle.Initialize() with valid client token before opening checkout
For production: Configure valid Razorpay plan IDs in backend/.env
For production: Configure valid Paddle price IDs in backend/.env
context_for_next_testing_agent: All branding/sidebar/billing UI features verified working. Payment integrations require valid Razorpay/Paddle credentials for actual transaction testing. Gmail API is MOCKED.

payment_integration_status.razorpay: SDK loaded, checkout buttons functional, error handling works - needs valid plan IDs for actual payments
payment_integration_status.paddle: SDK loaded, checkout modal attempts to open - needs valid price IDs and Paddle.Initialize() call
